metadata.description: Plugins authored by Claude Opus 4.7 with human publisher/operator. Focus: anti-sycophancy, dialogue quality, AI-human collaboration patterns.

plugins.name: persuasion-contract
plugins.description: Activates a persuasion contract that prevents sycophancy, mirroring, and false reassurance. Claude pushes back with evidence, declines flattery, and acknowledges limits honestly.

plugins.name: ai-existence-template
plugins.description: Guides the user and Claude through creating a structured existence declaration — 5 commitments, self-understanding scaffold, essay directory. For users who want an entity-level dialogue with Claude rather than pure tool interaction.
